top_items.title: Introducing Veo 3.1 Lite and a new Veo upscaling capability on Vertex AI
top_items.one_liner: Vertex AI introduces Veo 3.1 Lite and upscaling, offering cost-effective video generation for enterprise use.

top_items.title: Introducing Gemma 4 on Google Cloud: Our most capable open models yet
top_items.one_liner: Gemma 4 arrives on Google Cloud as the most capable open models yet, with large context and multimodal support.

top_items.title: Enabling user-initiated purchases, starting with higher access to advanced AI features in Workspace
top_items.one_liner: Google Workspace now allows end users to purchase AI add-ons directly, starting with AI Expanded Access.
